case_title: SAMEH ALSHRAIDEH VS. TOWN TAXI CAB ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-31-2018 CONTINUED TO MAR-14-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALSHRAIDEH, SAMEH AS TO DEFENDANT TOWN TAXI CAB DOES 1 TO 25 DESTA, MEGASI SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-31-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-04-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-08-2018

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-24-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-14-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 18056078)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-24-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
